title: Older Ping Display
description: A simple 1.7.10 client-side mod which displays each player's ping in the player list as a number.
body:
# Older Ping Display A simple client-side mod which displays each player's ping in the player list as a number. The mod is highly configurable. `1.7.10` backport of [Better Ping Display](https://github.com/vladmarica/better-ping-display-fabric). ![logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/OlderPingDisplay/master/images/logo_small.png) [![hub](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/OlderPingDisplay/master/images/badges/github.png)](https://github.com/JackOfNoneTrades/OlderPingDisplay/releases) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/OlderPingDisplay/master/images/badges/modrinth.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/olderpingdisplay) [![curse](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/OlderPingDisplay/master/images/badges/curse.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/olderpingdisplay) [![mcmodcn](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/OlderPingDisplay/master/images/badges/mcmodcn.png)](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/24647.html) [![67](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/OlderPingDisplay/master/images/badges/67.png)](https://67.fentanylsolutions.org/mod/olderpingdisplay/) [![maven](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/OlderPingDisplay/master/images/badges/maven.png)](https://maven.fentanylsolutions.org/#/releases/org/fentanylsolutions/olderpingdisplay/OlderPingDisplay) ![forge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/OlderPingDisplay/master/images/badges/forge.png) [![cord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/OlderPingDisplay/master/images/badges/cord.png)](https://discord.gg/xAWCqGrguG) ## Dependencies * [UniMixins](https://modrinth.com/mod/unimixins) [![curse](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/OlderPingDisplay/master/images/icons/curse.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/unimixins) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/OlderPingDisplay/master/images/icons/modrinth.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/unimixins/versions) [![git](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/OlderPingDisplay/master/images/icons/git.png)](https://github.com/LegacyModdingMC/UniMixins/releases) ![normal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/OlderPingDisplay/master/images/screenshots/normal.png) ![normal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/OlderPingDisplay/master/images/screenshots/tabfaces.png) Compatible with TabFaces [![curse](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/OlderPingDisplay/master/images/icons/curse.png)](https://github.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/blob/master/images/badges/forge.png) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/OlderPingDisplay/master/images/icons/modrinth.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/tabfaces) [![git](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/OlderPingDisplay/master/images/icons/git.png)](https://github.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/releases). ## Building `./gradlew build`. ## Credits * [Original mod](https://github.com/vladmarica/better-ping-display-fabric) * [NumericalTabPing](https://github.com/Nixuge/NumericalTabPing) * [GT:NH buildscript](https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/ExampleMod1.7.10) ## License `LGPLv3`. ## Buy me a coffee * [ko-fi.com](ko-fi.com/jackisasubtlejoke) * Monero: `893tQ56jWt7czBsqAGPq8J5BDnYVCg2tvKpvwTcMY1LS79iDabopdxoUzNLEZtRTH4ewAcKLJ4DM4V41fvrJGHgeKArxwmJ`
![license](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/OlderPingDisplay/master/images/license_small.png)
